The Addams Family 2 (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $56,489,153Details
International Box Office $62,894,083
Worldwide Box Office $119,383,236
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $979,857
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,379,014
Total $2,358,871
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Everyone’s favorite spooky family is back in the animated comedy sequel, The Addams Family 2. In this all new movie we find Morticia and Gomez distraught that their children are growing up, skipping family dinners, and totally consumed with “scream time.” To reclaim their bond they decide to cram Wednesday, Pugsley, Uncle Fester and the crew into their haunted camper and hit the road for one last miserable family vacation. Their adventure across America takes them out of their element and into hilarious run-ins with their iconic cousin, IT, as well as many new kooky characters. What could possibly go wrong?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,325,007 (30.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.3% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:4,207 opening theaters/4,207 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $66,431,688

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 1st, 2021 (Wide) by United Artists
International Releases: October 6th, 2021 (Wide), released as The Addams Family op vakantie (Netherlands)
October 7th, 2021 (Wide), released as Los Locos Addams 2 (Peru)
October 7th, 2021 (Wide), released as Los locos Addams 2 (Argentina)
October 8th, 2021 (Wide), released as Adamsų šeimynėlė 2 (Lithuania)
October 8th, 2021 (Wide) (Mongolia)
Video Release: October 1st, 2021 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: PG for macabre and rude humor, violence and language.
(Rating bulletin 2696 (cert #53345), 9/1/2021)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Addams Family
Cast, crew, or production detail: Sequel With Lead Character Recast
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Family Vacations, Road Trip
Release detail: Disrupted by 2020 COVID-19 pandemic
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Nitrogen Studios Canada, Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer Pictures
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Canada
Languages: English

Synopsis

Everyone’s favorite spooky family is back in the animated comedy sequel, The Addams Family 2. In this all new movie we find Morticia and Gomez distraught that their children are growing up, skipping family dinners, and totally consumed with “scream time.” To reclaim their bond they decide to cram Wednesday, Pugsley, Uncle Fester and the crew into their haunted camper and hit the road for one last miserable family vacation. Their adventure across America takes them out of their element and into hilarious run-ins with their iconic cousin, IT, as well as many new kooky characters. What could possibly go wrong?
